name: Nevada Canyon Gold Corp.
description: Nevada Canyon Gold Corp. is a Nevada-focused royalty, streaming, and exploration company operating a three-part business model: mineral royalty creation and acquisition, precious metals exploration streaming, and an exploration project accelerator. The company holds a 3% Net Smelter Royalty and an Exploration Stream Earn-in Agreement at the Lapon Canyon Project in Nevada, situated within the Walker Lane gold trend and owned by Walker River Resources. Nevada Canyon maintains a large strategic land position across several of Nevada's highest-grade historical mining districts and trades on the OTCQX Best Market.
